narrative:
Olmsted Township-00-F (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,286 registered voters, with 61.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.7 percentage points.
